title: Singapore MRT Circle Line C830 and C830C
description: SMRT Trains Circle Line C830 and C830C for Minecraft Transit Railway
body:
The Alstom Metropolis C830 and C830C are fully automated electric multiple units built for the Singapore MRT Circle Line. The C830 was the first train type in Singapore to use communications-based train control (CBTC) and entered service in 2009. The similar C830C was introduced 5 years later in 2014 and featured different traction equipment and interior design.

This pack adds these trains to Minecraft Transit Railway as retextures of the default A-Train.

**Minecraft Transit Railway** is required for this pack.

Contents:

- SMRT Trains C830 (regular and mini variants)
- SMRT Trains C830C (regular and mini variants)
